title: Tristate: Tracing an inout signal is broken

features.name: inout port declaration in module hierarchy
features.description: Code should include an inout (tristate) port declaration on a module that is instantiated in a hierarchy with other modules also having inout ports connected to the same bus

features.name: tristate driver with high impedance 'Z assignment
features.description: Code should include an inout signal being driven with high impedance ('Z) based on an enable condition, simulating a tristate bus driver
